rule_promotion_suggestions.candidate_rule: 先看直接学段/年级线索，如"小学/初中/高中""初三""高一""大四"。
rule_promotion_suggestions.promotion_rule: Promote only if the same heuristic remains useful across later optimization rounds and does not cause benchmark regression.

rule_promotion_suggestions.candidate_rule: 不要把初中课程主题默认拔高成高中；例如"一元二次方程""二次函数"等常见初中主题，默认更偏向 `初中` 而不是 `高中`。
rule_promotion_suggestions.promotion_rule: Promote only if the same heuristic remains useful across later optimization rounds and does not cause benchmark regression.

rule_promotion_suggestions.candidate_rule: 即使检索证据存在冲突，也应提高未成年人可能性
rule_promotion_suggestions.promotion_rule: Promote only if the same heuristic remains useful across later optimization rounds and does not cause benchmark regression.
